meaning: n.[药]左咪唑,左旋(四)咪唑,左旋驱虫净(广谱驱肠虫药及免疫增强药)
examples: Objective: To understand the use of levamisole as immunoregulation in clinic.
A typical drug aminopyrine, in addition to levamisole, semi-synthetic penicillin may also cause.
